            valueType: rule.valueType,
            isPenalty: isPenalty
          });
        }
      }
      else if (rule.valueType === 'stack') {
        // The value is the number of times they have this effect
        let value = target?.effectIds?.filter(id => id === effect?._id).length;
        if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
          value = -value;
        }
        if (value !== 0) {
          results.push({
            name: effect.name || 'Effect',
            value: value,
            active: true,
            modifierType: ruleType,
            field: rule?.field || '',
            valueType: rule.valueType,
            isPenalty: isPenalty
          });
        }
      }
    });
  });

  // Now collect all modifiers from Features
  const features = target?.record?.data?.features || [];
  features.forEach((feature) => {
    const modifiers = feature.data?.modifiers || [];
    modifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      const ruleType = modifier.data?.type || '';
      const isPenalty = ruleType.toLowerCase().includes('penalty');
      let value = modifier.data?.value || '';
      if (modifier.data?.valueType === 'number') {
        value = parseInt(modifier.data?.value, 10);
        if (isNaN(value)) {
          value = 0;
        }
        if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
          value = -value;
        }
      }
      else if (modifier.data?.valueType === 'field') {
        const fieldToUse = modifier.data?.value || '';
        if (fieldToUse) {
          value = target?.record?.data?.[fieldToUse] || '';
        }
      }
      else if (modifier.data?.valueType === 'string' && !value.trim().startsWith('-') && isPenalty) {
        value = '-' + value;
      }

      // Only relevant if it has a value
      if (value !== 0) {
        results.push({
          name: feature?.name || 'Feature',
          value: value,
          active: modifier.data?.active === true,
          modifierType: ruleType,
          field: modifier.data?.field || '',
          valueType: modifier.data?.valueType,
          isPenalty: isPenalty
        });
      }
    });
  });

  if (types && types.length > 0) {
    results = results.filter(r => types.includes(r.modifierType));
  }

  if (field && field !== '') {
    results = results.filter(r => r.field === field || r.field === 'all');
  }

  return results;
}
    `;
  }

  // Returns a script to inject into a macro that gets a target's armor class
  // from effects and modifiers
  function getArmorClassScript() {
    return `
      function getArmorClassForToken(token) {
        const record = token?.record;
        const acCalculationMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['armorClassCalculation']);
        const dexMod = parseInt(record?.data?.dexterityMod || '0', 10);
        let armorClass = 10 + dexMod;
        let calcBonus = 0;
        acCalculationMods.forEach(mod => {
          // We only benefit from the highest AC calculation modifier
          if (mod.field && mod.field !== 'dexterity') {
            const acBonus = attribute !== mod.field ? parseInt(record?.data?.[\`\$\{mod.field\}Mod\`] || '0', 10) : modVal;
            if (acBonus > calcBonus) {
              calcBonus = acBonus;
            }
          }
        });
        // Get general AC bonuses
        const acBonuses = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['armorClassBonus', 'armorClassPenalty']);
        acBonuses.forEach(mod => {
          if (mod.value) {
            const acBonus = parseInt(mod.value || '0', 10);
            if (!isNaN(acBonus)) {
              calcBonus += acBonus;
            }
          }
        });
        armorClass += calcBonus;
        return armorClass;
      }
    `;
  }

  // Goes through the effects of the attacker and determiners
  // if we need to apply any modifiers
  function getSpellAttackModifiers(spell) {
    // It could be a numerical modifier, or a die we are adding
    let attackModifiers = [];

    const spellModBonus = parseInt(api.getValue('data.spellModBonus') || '0', 10);

    if (spell?.data?.isAttack) {
      const attackAbility = spell?.data?.ability || 'strength';
      const attackAbilityMod = parseInt(api.getValue(`data.${attackAbility}Mod`) || '0', 10);
      // Add proficiency bonus to attack modifier
      const proficiencyBonus = api.getValue('data.proficiencyBonus') !== undefined ?
        parseInt(api.getValue('data.proficiencyBonus'), 10) : 2;
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: capitalize(attackAbility),
        value: attackAbilityMod,
        active: true,
      });
      attackModifiers.push({
        name: 'Spellcasting Proficiency',
        value: proficiencyBonus,
        active: true,
      });
      if (spellModBonus > 0) {
        attackModifiers.push({
          name: 'Additional Spell Modifier Bonus',
          value: spellModBonus,
          active: true,
        });
      }
    }

    // Get effects
    const effectModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(['attackBonus', 'attackPenalty']);
    effectModifiers.forEach(modifier => {
      attackModifiers.push(modifier);
    });

    return attackModifiers;
  }

  // Injects a script to the Roll Save macro to get saving throw modifiers
  function getSaveModifiers(savingThrow) {
    return `
      const saveModifiers = [];

      const record = token?.record;

      const modifier = record?.data?.['${savingThrow}Save'] || 0;
      saveModifiers.push({
        name: '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
        value: modifier,
        active: true,
      });

      // Go through the effects and get any save bonuses or penalties
      const effects = token?.effects || [];
      const effectValues = token?.effectValues || {};
      effects.forEach(effect => {
        const rules = effect.rules || [];
        rules.forEach(rule => {
          if ((rule.type === 'saveBonus' || rule.type === 'savePenalty') && 
            (rule.field === '${savingThrow}' || rule.field === 'all')) {
            const isPenalty = rule.type === 'savePenalty';
            let value = rule.value;
            if (rule.valueType === 'number') {
              value = parseInt(rule.value, 10);
              if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
                value = -value;
              }
            }
            else if (rule.valueType === 'string' && !value.trim().startsWith('-') && isPenalty) {
              value = '-' + value;
            }
            if (value !== 0) {
              saveModifiers.push({
                name: effect.name || 'Effect',
                value: value,
                active: true,
              });
            }
            else if (rule.valueType === 'api') {
              let value = parseInt(record?.effectValues?.[effect?._id] || '0', 10);
              if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
                value = -value;
              }
              if (value !== 0) {
                saveModifiers.push({
                  name: effect.name || 'Effect',
                  value: value,
                  active: true,
                });
              }
            }
            else if (rule.valueType === 'stack') {
              // The value is the number of times they have this effect
              let value = record?.effectIds?.filter(id => id === effect?._id).length;
              if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
                value = -value;
              }
              if (value !== 0) {
                saveModifiers.push({
                  name: effect.name || 'Effect',
                  value: value,
                  active: true,
                });
              }
            }
          }
        });
      });

      // Now collect all modifiers from Features
      const features = record?.data?.features || [];
      features.forEach((feature) => {
        const modifiers = feature.data?.modifiers || [];
        modifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
          const ruleType = modifier.data?.type || '';
          const isPenalty = ruleType.toLowerCase().includes('penalty');
          let value = modifier.data?.value || '';
          const field = modifier.data?.field || '';
          if ((ruleType === 'saveBonus' || ruleType === 'savePenalty') && (field === '${savingThrow}' || field === 'all')) {
            if (modifier.data?.valueType === 'number') {
              value = parseInt(modifier.data?.value, 10);
              if (isNaN(value)) {
                value = 0;
              }
              if (isPenalty && value > 0) {
                value = -value;
              }
            }
            else if (modifier.data?.valueType === 'string' && !value.trim().startsWith('-') && isPenalty) {
              value = '-' + value;
            }

            // Only relevant if it has a value
            if (value !== 0) {
              saveModifiers.push({
                name: feature?.name || 'Feature',
                value: value,
                active: modifier.data?.active === true,
              });
            }
          }
        });
      });
    `;
  }

  function capitalize(string) {
    if (!string || typeof string !== 'string') return '';
    return string.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + string.slice(1);
  }

  function castSpell() {
    // Get the spell by path to ensure most up-to-date value
    const spellDataPath = dataPath.replace('.data.castBtn', '');
    const spell = api.getValue(spellDataPath);

    const spellName = spell?.name || 'Unknown Spell';
    const spellDescription = api.richTextToMarkdown(spell?.data?.description || '');
    const spellIcon = spell?.portrait ? `![${spellName}](${assetUrl}${spell?.portrait}?width=40&height=40) ` : '';

    // Get and additional modifiers from spell caster settings
    const spellDCBonus = parseInt(api.getValue('data.spellDCBonus') || '0', 10);

    // Modifiers for Damage and Healing
    const modifiers = [];
    if ((spell?.data?.damage || spell?.data?.healing) && spell?.data?.addAbility) {
      // Get the ability score modifier for the spell
      const ability = spell?.data?.ability || 'strength';
      const abilityMod = api.getValue(`data.${ability}Mod`) || 0;
      // Safely parse the damage type from the damage string, handling potential null values and irregular spacing
      const damageString = spell?.data?.damage || '';
      const damageParts = damageString.trim().split(/\s+/); // Split by one or more spaces
      const damageType = damageParts.length > 1 ? damageParts[1] : 'untyped';
      modifiers.push({
        name: capitalize(ability),
        type: spell?.data?.damage ? damageType : 'healing',
        value: abilityMod,
        active: true,
      });
    }

    // Spell Attack Modifiers
    const attackModifiers = getSpellAttackModifiers(spell);

    // Deteremine damage or healing based on level of spell / (or character if cantrip)
    let spellDamage = spell?.data?.damage;
    let spellHealing = spell?.data?.healing;

    // Mark the level we're casting at so we can fill a slot
    let spellLevel = 0;

    // Deduct spell slot or daily uses and update spell level
    const spellPrepared = spell?.data?.prepared || 'prepared';
    let actualSpellLevel = spell?.data?.level || 'Cantrip';
    if (actualSpellLevel === 'Cantrip') {
      actualSpellLevel = '0';
    }
    actualSpellLevel = parseInt(actualSpellLevel, 10);
    if (spellPrepared === 'prepared' && actualSpellLevel > 0) {
      let spellSlot = parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || `${actualSpellLevel}`, 10) || 1;

      // Determine if we are using a spell slot of a pact magic slot
      let fieldToUse = '';
      let maxField = '';

      // Pact Magic Slots available
      const numPactMagicAvail1 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic1 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic1 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail2 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic2 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic2 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail3 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic3 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic3 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail4 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic4 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic4 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail5 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic5 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic5 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail6 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic6 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic6 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail7 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic7 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic7 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail8 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic8 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic8 || '0', 10);
      const numPactMagicAvail9 = parseInt(record?.data?.numPactMagic9 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.pactMagic9 || '0', 10);

      // Spell Slots available  
      const numSpellSlots1Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots1 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots1 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots2Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots2 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots2 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots3Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots3 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots3 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots4Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots4 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots4 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots5Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots5 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots5 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots6Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots6 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots6 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots7Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots7 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots7 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots8Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots8 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots8 || '0', 10);
      const numSpellSlots9Avail = parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots9 || '0', 10) - parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots9 || '0', 10);

      const hasPactAvailable = (numPactMagicAvail1 > 0 || numPactMagicAvail2 > 0 || numPactMagicAvail3 > 0 || numPactMagicAvail4 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail5 > 0 || numPactMagicAvail6 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail7 > 0 || numPactMagicAvail8 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail9 > 0);

      const hasSpellSlotsAvailable = (numSpellSlots1Avail > 0 || numSpellSlots2Avail > 0 || numSpellSlots3Avail > 0 || numSpellSlots4Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots5Avail > 0 || numSpellSlots6Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots7Avail > 0 || numSpellSlots8Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots9Avail > 0);

      //  Use a pact magic slot if we have any available and we're using pact magic, or if we don't have any spell slots available
      if (hasPactAvailable && (record?.data?.usePactMagic || !hasSpellSlotsAvailable)) {
        const availablePactSlots = [
          numPactMagicAvail1,
          numPactMagicAvail2,
          numPactMagicAvail3,
          numPactMagicAvail4,
          numPactMagicAvail5,
          numPactMagicAvail6,
          numPactMagicAvail7,
          numPactMagicAvail8,
          numPactMagicAvail9
        ];

        const lowestPactMagicIndex = availablePactSlots.findIndex(pactMagic => pactMagic > 0);
        const lowestPactMagic = lowestPactMagicIndex + 1;

        if (lowestPactMagic > 0) { // Ensure that there is at least one available slot
          if (actualSpellLevel <= lowestPactMagic) {
            // For pact magic, we always upcast to the lowest available slot
            // (Generally never above level 5 but we allow it just in case)
            spellSlot = lowestPactMagic;
            fieldToUse = `pactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
            maxField = `numPactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
          }
        }
      }
      else {
        // Otherwise we use the spell slot for the level being cast at
        fieldToUse = `spellSlots${spellSlot}`;
        maxField = `numSpellSlots${spellSlot}`;
      }

      spellLevel = spellSlot;

      let numSpellSlots = parseInt(api.getValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`) || '0', 10);
      let numMaxSpellSlots = parseInt(api.getValue(`data.${maxField}`) || '0', 10);

      if (numSpellSlots < numMaxSpellSlots) {
        api.setValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`, numSpellSlots + 1);
      }
    } else if (spell?.data?.prepared === 'daily') {
      let dailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.dailyUses, 10) || 0;
      let maxDailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.maxDailyUses, 10) || 1;
      if (dailyUses < maxDailyUses) {
        const dataPathToDaily = dataPath.replace('.data.castBtn', '.data.dailyUses');
        api.setValue(dataPathToDaily, dailyUses + 1);
      }
    }

    if (spell?.data?.level === '0') {
      // Cantrip handling
      // Get the character's level
      const characterLevel = parseInt(api.getValue('data.level') || '1', 10);
      if (characterLevel >= 5) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 11) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 17) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
    }
    else {
      // Spell handling
      // Check if we're upcasting
      if (spellLevel === 0) {
        spellLevel = parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || spell?.data?.level, 10) || 0;
      }
      // Check if damage is defined at that level
      if (spellLevel >= 2) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.[`damageLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellHealing = spell?.data?.[`healingLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.healing;
      }
    }

    // Get save info, if Save
    const savingThrow = spell?.data?.savingThrow || 'dexterity'; // Default to dexterity if not set 
    // Spell Save DC is 8 + Spellcasting Ability Modifier + Proficiency Bonus (We assume they are proficient)
    const spellcastingAbility = spell?.data?.ability || 'intelligence';
    const spellcastingAbilityMod = api.getValue(`data.${spellcastingAbility}Mod`) || 0;
    const proficiencyBonus = api.getValue('data.proficiencyBonus') !== undefined ? api.getValue('data.proficiencyBonus') : 2;
    const saveDc = 8 + parseInt(spellcastingAbilityMod, 10) + parseInt(proficiencyBonus, 10) + spellDCBonus;

    // Damage Button if this is a Saving Throw Spell (Attacks have it on Attack Output)
    const saveDamageMetadata = spell?.data?.isSave ? { save: savingThrow, saveDc: saveDc } : {};
    const damageButton = spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.isSave ? `\`\`\`Roll_Damage
api.promptRoll('${spellName} Damage', '${spellDamage}', ${JSON.stringify(modifiers)}, ${JSON.stringify(saveDamageMetadata)}, 'damage')
\`\`\`` : '';

    const healingButton = spell?.data?.healing ? `\`\`\`Roll_Healing
api.promptRoll('${spellName} Healing', '${spellHealing}', ${JSON.stringify(modifiers)}, {}, 'healing')
\`\`\`` : '';

    // Roll Attack Button, if Spell is an Attack, in the handler we get the targets and
    // roll for each target - DC for Attacks is the enemy's AC
    const rollAttackButton = spell?.data?.isAttack ? `\`\`\`Roll_Attack
${getEffectsAndModifiersScript()}
${getArmorClassScript()}
const targets = api.getTargets();
targets.forEach(target => {
  // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
  const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
  const targetName = target?.token?.identified === false ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName : target?.token?.record?.name;
  const diceRoll = '1d20';
  const metadata = {  

    "rollName": 'Attack',
    "attack": '${spellName}',
    "icon": "IconWand",
    "targetName": targetName,
    "tooltip": 'Attack Roll for ${spellName}',
    "dc": targetAc,
    "damage": "${spellDamage}",
    "damageModifiers": ${JSON.stringify(modifiers)}
  }
  api.promptRoll('${spellName}', \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, ${JSON.stringify(attackModifiers)}, metadata, 'attack');
});
\`\`\`` : '';

    // Save Button for GM only - look up saves of selected tokens and prompt roll for each
    const rollSaveButton = spell?.data?.isSave ? `\`\`\`Roll_Save
if (isGM) { 
  const selectedTokens = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
  selectedTokens.forEach(token => {
    ${getSaveModifiers(savingThrow)}

    const metadata = {
      "rollName": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
      "tooltip": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Saving Throw',
      "dc": ${saveDc}
    }

    api.promptRollForToken(token, '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save', '1d20', saveModifiers, metadata, 'save');
  });
}
\`\`\`` : '';

    // Create macros for all effects that this spell can apply
    let effectButtons = '';
    const effects = spell?.data?.effects || [];
    effects.forEach(effectJson => {
      const effect = JSON.parse(effectJson);
      const effectName = effect?.name || '';
      const effectID = effect?._id || '';
      const effectTitle = `Apply_${effectName.replace(/ /g, '_')}`;
      if (effectButtons !== '') {
        effectButtons += '\n';
      }
      effectButtons += `\`\`\`${effectTitle}
let targets = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
targets.forEach(target => {
  api.addEffectById('${effectID}', target);
});
\`\`\``;
    });

    const message = `
#### ${spellIcon}${spellName}

---
 

${spellDescription}

---
 

${rollAttackButton}
${rollSaveButton}
${damageButton}
${healingButton}
${effectButtons}
`;

    const castingTime = spell?.data?.castingTime;
    const range = spell?.data?.range;
    let duration = spell?.data?.duration || '';
    const hasConcentration = duration?.toLowerCase().startsWith('concentration');
    duration = duration.replace('Concentration, ', '').trim();

    let components = spell?.data?.components;
    if (components) {
      components = components.split(',');
      components = components.map(component => {
        const trimmedComponent = component.trim().toLowerCase(); // Trim and convert to lower case
        if (trimmedComponent === 'v') {
          return 'Verbal';
        } else if (trimmedComponent === 's') {
          return 'Somatic';
        } else if (trimmedComponent === 'm') {
          return 'Material';
        } else if (trimmedComponent === 'f') {
          return 'Focus';
        } else if (trimmedComponent.startsWith('m (')) {
          return 'Material';
        }
        return component.trim(); // Return the trimmed component if no match
      });
    }

    const tags = [{
      'tooltip': "Cast a Spell",
      'name': 'Spell'
    }];

    if (castingTime) {
      tags.push({
        'tooltip': "Casting Time",
        'name': castingTime
      });
    }

    if (range) {
      tags.push({
        'tooltip': "Range",
        'name': range
      });
    }

    if (hasConcentration) {
      tags.push({
        'tooltip': "This Spell Requires Concentration",
        'name': "Concentration"
      });
    }

    if (duration) {
      tags.push({
        'tooltip': "Duration",
        'name': duration
      });
    }

    if (components && Array.isArray(components) && components.length > 0) {
      components.forEach(component => {
        tags.push({
          'tooltip': 'Spell Components',
          'name': component
        });
      });
    }

    let lostConcentrationOn = '';
    if (hasConcentration) {
      // Check for existing Concentration effect
      const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
      const effects = tokenForRecord?.effects || [];
      const hasEffect = effects.find(effect => effect?.name?.toLowerCase() === 'concentration');
      if (tokenForRecord) {
        const effectValue = spellName;
        // Old spell name
        let oldSpellName = '';
        const oldValues = tokenForRecord?.effectValues || {};
        if (oldValues[hasEffect?._id]) {
          oldSpellName = oldValues[hasEffect?._id];
        }
        lostConcentrationOn = oldSpellName;
        // Add concentration effect, which will replace any existing concentration effect
        api.addEffect('Concentration', tokenForRecord, undefined, effectValue);
      }
    }

    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], tags);

    if (lostConcentrationOn) {
      api.sendMessage(`Lost concentration on ${lostConcentrationOn}.`, undefined, [], []);
    }
  }

  // Returns the options for upcasting a spell
  function getLevelOptions() {
    const iconButtonOptions = [
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber1", "label": "Level 1", "value": 1 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber2", "label": "Level 2", "value": 2 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber3", "label": "Level 3", "value": 3 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber4", "label": "Level 4", "value": 4 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber5", "label": "Level 5", "value": 5 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber6", "label": "Level 6", "value": 6 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber7", "label": "Level 7", "value": 7 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber8", "label": "Level 8", "value": 8 },
      { "icon": "IconCircleNumber9", "label": "Level 9", "value": 9 },
    ]

    const spellLevel = parseInt(value?.data?.level, 10) || 0; // Default to 0 if no level is set
    return iconButtonOptions.filter(option => option.value >= spellLevel);
  }

  function toggleDaily() {
    const prepared = value;
    // We're in a list, so we need to use the data path to the fields metadata
    const dataPathToHideDaily = dataPath.replace('.data.prepared', '.fields.maxDailyUses.hidden');
    const dataPathToHideCounter = dataPath.replace('.data.prepared', '.fields.dailyUses.hidden');
    if (prepared === 'daily') {
      api.setValue(dataPathToHideDaily, false);
      api.setValue(dataPathToHideCounter, false);
    } else {
      api.setValue(dataPathToHideDaily, true);
      api.setValue(dataPathToHideCounter, true);
    }
  }
</script>
